metadata.source_note: Income Tax (Amendment) Act, 2023 (Act No. 22 of 2023) assented print from the National Assembly of Zambia document repository (text-embedded Government Printer print). Section 11(a) amends Charging Schedule paragraph 2(1): item (c)'s bound becomes sixty-one thousand two hundred Kwacha and items (d)-(f) are substituted with the 20/30/37 percent rows in force for the charge years 2024 and 2025 (calendar years). Section 11(b) amends paragraph 5 (one-seventh to one-fifth in item (a); cotton items inserted) — captured for chain diligence.
metadata.title: Income Tax (Amendment) Act, 2023 (Act No. 22 of 2023) — Charging Schedule paragraph 2(1) individual rates

metadata.source_note: Income Tax (Amendment) Act, 2024 (Act No. 22 of 2024) assented print from the National Assembly of Zambia document repository (text-embedded Government Printer print; gazette publication 26 December 2024). Carries the CY2025 changes encoded by rulespec-zm: the s.37(1) substitution restricting the approved-fund deduction to employers, the s.64A turnover ceiling of five million kwacha, and the Ninth Schedule Part II turnover rate table (0 percent at or below K12,000; 5 percent above K12,000 up to K5,000,000).
metadata.title: Income Tax (Amendment) Act, 2024 (Act No. 22 of 2024) — s.37(1) employer-only deduction; s.64A turnover ceiling; Ninth Schedule turnover rates
